header.title: Unlock PDF — Remove Password from PDF Files Online
header.description: Free online PDF unlocker to remove password protection from your PDF files. Enter the document password to decrypt and download an unprotected copy instantly. Unlock secured PDFs for editing, printing, or viewing — 100% client-side, files never uploaded.
header.keywords: unlock pdf, remove pdf password, pdf password remover, unlock pdf online, pdf unlocker, remove protection from pdf, decrypt pdf, free pdf unlocker

legal.notice: You must own or have permission to unlock this PDF. Only use this tool on PDFs you own or are authorized to decrypt. Bypassing protection on others' documents may violate copyright law.

privacy.notice: 100% client-side. Your PDF and password never leave your browser — everything runs locally using pdf-lib.

password.label: Password
password.hint: Enter the document's password to unlock
password.notNeeded: No password needed — file is not encrypted
password.liveVerificationUnavailable: (Live verification not available for AES-encrypted PDFs — try unlocking directly)

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step2: Enter the correct user or owner password
howItWorks.step3: The tool decrypts and re-saves the PDF without any password

status.protectedDesc: Encryption: {algorithm} · Enter the password to remove it
status.notProtectedDesc: You can still remove permission restrictions by clicking Unlock below

errors.checkPassword: Make sure you entered the correct user or owner password.

capabilities.title: What this tool can do
capabilities.removePassword: Remove password when you know it

howToUse.title: How to Use Unlock PDF
howToUse.step1Desc: Drop or upload the password-protected PDF file you want to unlock.
howToUse.step2Desc: Type the correct user or owner password. The tool will verify it when possible.
howToUse.step3Desc: Check the algorithm, key length, and file ID to understand the protection type.
howToUse.step4Desc: Click 'Unlock & Download PDF' to get a password-free copy — all decryption happens in your browser.

items.question: What encryption types are supported?
items.answer: RC4-40, RC4-128, AES-128, and AES-256 encrypted PDFs are all supported. Live password verification works for RC4; AES PDFs require trying the unlock directly.

items.question: Can this tool crack or guess passwords?
items.answer: No. You must enter the correct password to unlock the PDF. This tool cannot crack, brute-force, or recover forgotten passwords.

items.question: What is the difference between user and owner unlock?
items.answer: A user password lets you open the document. An owner password also strips permission restrictions. Either one can unlock the PDF.

items.question: Is my password sent to a server?
items.answer: No. Everything runs client-side using pdf-lib. Your PDF and password never leave your browser.

items.question: Can I remove permission restrictions without a password?
items.answer: If the PDF has no user password but has owner-only protection, you can strip permission restrictions without entering a password.
